perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) Two women are standing in a large pet supply store with shelves full of products; one woman holds a small white dog. (2) The scene shifts through various aisles as the women hold up different pet items: circular cat scratching pads, a tall wooden cat tree, boxes of cat litter, and packs of pet wet wipes. (3) A close-up shows the texture of a white wet wipe being stretched by hands. (4) They move to food sections, displaying stacks of canned food, bags of freeze-dried snacks, and red gift boxes for the Lunar New Year. (5) In the final segment, they stand near a checkout or promotional area with a large box of green dental chews and several Polaroid photos of pets.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Fast-paced, upbeat electronic background music begins immediately with a high-energy male voiceover speaking Mandarin. (2) As different products appear, the male narrator's tone remains excited, highlighting prices and 'buy one get one' deals while various 'ding' and 'pop' sound effects punctuate the transitions. (3) The female characters are heard briefly with high-pitched exclamations of 'wow' or 'so cheap,' but their voices are largely layered under the dominant narration and music. (4) The audio concludes with a final enthusiastic summary from the narrator as the music maintains its energetic tempo.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Large, colorful decorative text at the top reads 'Pet Version Costco Must Buy Recommendations' (寵物版好市多必買推薦) in a hook-style font. (2) Functional subtitles appear at the bottom, translating the fast-paced Mandarin narration. (3) Various prices and promotional stickers like '$599', '$279', 'Buy 1 Get 1' (買一送一), and 'Too Cheap!' (太便宜了!) appear dynamically on screen in vibrant colors.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro -> Rapid Product Showcase -> Pricing Highlights -> Promotion Outro

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 2 main female creators, 1 female shopper in background, 1 male shopper in far background
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: One woman is wearing a brown tiered dress with a black cardigan; the other wears a black and white patterned sweater with a grey fuzzy bucket hat.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A spacious warehouse-style retail environment with high metal shelves, brightly lit by fluorescent studio-style lighting, filled with colorful pet food packaging and large pet furniture.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Product Features/Prices -> CTA/Special Event
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: This video functions as a high-energy consumer guide and promotional advertisement for a pet supply warehouse. By using the 'Costco' comparison, it establishes a value proposition of bulk savings and variety. The fast-paced editing and constant price reveals are designed to create a sense of urgency and excitement for pet owners to visit the store.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video explicitly names the store and highlights specific product prices and exclusive 'buy one get one' deals while showing the physical store location.
endorsementObject: 嗨！寵物們 Hi! Pet Chan

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: High-speed narrator voice-over combined with variety-show style text graphics and high-saturation color grading.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video targets budget-conscious pet owners in Taiwan, emphasizing the Lunar New Year theme with specific gift-box products.
